heading: Omitted
label: 531 to 535 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 531 to 535, relating to Territory of Hawaii, were omitted in view of admission of Hawaii into the Union.Section 531, acts , ; , , vested executive power in a governor and set out his age and residence requirements, appointment, term, and powers in general.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 6631 Stat. 153July 9, 1921, ch. 42, § 30342 Stat. 116Section 532, , , made governor responsible for the execution of all laws and granted him other executive powers.act Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 6731 Stat. 153Section 533, , , vested in governor powers and duties of specified former officials.act Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 6831 Stat. 153Section 534, acts , ; , ; , , , called for appointment of a Secretary of Hawaii and set out powers and duties of his office.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 6931 Stat. 154July 2, 1932, ch. 38947 Stat. 565Pub. L. 85–71472 Stat. 707Aug. 21, 1958Section 535, , , called for secretary to perform duties of governor in event of governor’s death, removal, resignation, or disability.act Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 7031 Stat. 154
